  "findings": [
    "Missing end seal on the heat trace cable run."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved end seal kit on the heat trace cable before energizing or insulation cladding is applied."
  ],
  "rationale": "A missing end seal on a heat trace cable leaves the conductive cores exposed to moisture and environmental elements, creating a severe shock and short-circuit hazard. Per NEC 427, all termination and end seals must be installed in accordance with manufacturer instructions to maintain the integrity of the system.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 427.22",
    "NEC 427.23"
  ]
